features: DURACELL cr2430 LITHIUM COIN BATTERIES are ideal for use in key fobs, small remotes, sensors, car keys, medical and sports devices.
LONG LIFE GUARANTEED you can be confident these lithium coin batteries will be ready when you need them.
BABY SECURE PACKAGING: With double blister that is difficult to open without scissors
IN PARTNERSHIP WITH THE EUROPEAN ASSOCIATION OF PEADIATRICS
GUARANTEED LIFE FOR 10 YEARS IN STORAGE
HIGH-PURITY LITHIUM to guarantee excellent, reliable performance.
